category: Frameworks, mobile, games, hardware, and creative ecosystems

surface.name: Canva Apps SDK Quickstart CLI hello_world preview
surface.selection_basis: Canva Apps SDK documentation names Quickstart to get an app running in minutes. The first fully specified route uses the Canva CLI with hello_world, public distribution, and Preview in the Canva editor. Connect APIs quickstart is a separate OAuth starter-kit clone path.

alternatives_considered.name: Connect APIs starter kit
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Separate Connect integration surface requiring local clone of ecommerce demo and OAuth redirect app.

alternatives_considered.name: Manual Developer Portal starter kit
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Manual tab peer; CLI tab creates the app and opens configuration in one flow.

entry_point.developer_intent: Create a Canva account, scaffold a hello_world app with the Canva CLI, and preview Hello world in the Canva editor.
assumed_prior_state: Node.js v24, npm v11, and git can be installed.

documented_first_success.official_milestone: Preview Hello world in the Canva editor
documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: The hello_world app preview opens in Canva and the example button responds with Hello world.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: In the preview editor, clicking the example control shows the Hello world response documented for the template.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: Quickstart Step 3 Preview says the example app includes a button that responds with Hello world when clicked.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: Apps SDK first success is an interactive preview inside Canva, not marketplace submission.

prerequisites.requirement: git, Node.js v24, npm v11, and Canva CLI.

primary_path.action: Create or sign in to a Canva account.
primary_path.input: Intent to build a Canva app

primary_path.action: Install @canva/cli globally and run canva login; allow access and paste the confirmation code.
Run canva apps create with hello_world, public distribution, git, and installDependencies.
details: Example: canva apps create "My New App" --template="hello_world" --distribution="public" --git --installDependencies
primary_path.output: Local app project + Developer Portal config page
primary_path.success_signal: Developer Portal opens the new app configuration.

primary_path.action: cd into the app folder and run npm start so the local server listens on localhost:8080.
In Developer Portal Code upload, set Development URL to the local server and click Preview / Open.
details: Chrome may prompt to allow local network access.

primary_path.action: Click the example control and confirm Hello world.

friction_gates.description: Browser OAuth allow + confirmation code for Canva CLI.
